mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO test_product (product_code, product_name, price, stock, category, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.productCode}, #{item.productName}, #{item.price}, #{item.stock}, #{item.category}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM test_product WHERE category = #{category} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM test_product WHERE product_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productCode}, '%') AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM test_product WHERE price BETWEEN #{minPrice} AND #{maxPrice} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY price ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE test_product SET stock = stock - #{quantity}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND stock >= #{quantity} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE test_product SET stock = stock + #{quantity}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM test_product WHERE stock < #{threshold} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY stock ASC
